content: Anti-patterns users hate: core features behind paywalls, bloated UIs optimized for upsells, excessive maintenance burden keeping categories updated, auto-sync failures requiring manual fixes, cluttered dashboards showing everything at once, non-customizable alerts causing notification fatigue, dark patterns making account deletion hard, hidden fees, invasive data tracking. 80% of finance apps lose users within 3 months. Users revert to spreadsheets when apps feel like more work than manual tracking.
